violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Working container holding food item was not labeled properly to identify contents. - Several zip lock bags in walk-in cooler were not dated or labeled.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. - Filters above fryer/grill in need of cleaning.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Attachments to walls and ceilings (e.g. light fixtures, vent covers, decorations etc..) were not cleanable and/or maintained in good repair. - Egg crate type ceiling panels are next to grill hood. Pieces of the plastic panels are missing.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
